name: Bourbon Barbecue Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, heavy saucepan, melt the butter and oil together.
2. Saute the onions until they are tender.
3. Add the garlic and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Combine the molasses, ketchup, vinegar, mustard, pepper, lemon juice, lemon rind, soy sauce, paprika, and bourbon in a separate bowl.
5. Stir this mixture into the onion mixture.
6. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Allow to cool completely before refrigerating in a covered container.
